name: penpot-mcp
description: AI-agent skill for creating, auditing, and maintaining production-grade Penpot design projects, design systems, flows, interactions, animations, tokens, and visual effects via the official Penpot MCP Server.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json package-lock.json eslint.config.mjs scripts/**/*.mjs .github/workflows/**/*.yml --end-of-line auto
scripts.check:whitespace: git diff --check -- .github README.md package.json penpot-mcp scripts && git diff --cached --check -- .github README.md package.json penpot-mcp scripts

author: ar27111994
